member.name: M:Kiosk.Api.Controllers.CustomerController.GetCustomers
member.summary: Retrieves all customers along with their associated kiosks.
member.returns: A list of customers with their kiosks.
member.response: Returns the list of customers.
If there was an error retrieving the customers.

member.name: M:Kiosk.Api.Controllers.CustomerController.GetCustomer(System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves a specific customer by ID, including their kiosks and devices.
member.param: The ID of the customer to retrieve.
member.returns: The customer with the specified ID, including their kiosks and devices.
member.response: Returns the customer with the specified ID.

member.name: M:Kiosk.Api.Controllers.CustomerController.PostCustomer(Kiosk.Domain.DTOs.CreateCustomerDto)
member.param: The customer data to create.
member.response: Returns the newly created customer.
If the customer data is invalid.
If there was an error creating the customer.

member.name: M:Kiosk.Api.Controllers.CustomerController.PutCustomer(System.Int32,Kiosk.Domain.DTOs.UpdateCustomerDto)
member.param: The ID of the customer to update.
The updated customer data.
member.returns: No content if the update was successful, or NotFound if the customer does not exist.

member.name: M:Kiosk.Api.Controllers.CustomerController.DeleteCustomer(System.Int32)
member.param: The ID of the customer to delete.
member.returns: No content if the deletion was successful, or NotFound if the customer does not exist.

member.name: M:Kiosk.Api.Controllers.CustomerController.AssignKioskToCustomer(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Assigns a kiosk to a customer.
member.param: The ID of the customer to assign the kiosk to.
The ID of the kiosk to assign.
member.returns: No content if the assignment was successful, or NotFound if the customer or kiosk does not exist.

member.name: M:Kiosk.Api.Controllers.CustomerController.UnassignKioskFromCustomer(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Unassigns a kiosk from a customer.
member.param: The ID of the customer to unassign the kiosk from.
The ID of the kiosk to unassign.
member.returns: No content if the unassignment was successful, or NotFound if the customer or kiosk does not exist, or if the kiosk is not assigned to this customer.

member.name: M:Kiosk.Api.Controllers.DeviceController.GetDevices
member.summary: Retrieves all devices with their associated kiosk and customer information.
member.returns: A list of all devices with their kiosk details.
member.response: Returns the list of devices.
If there was an error retrieving the devices.

member.name: M:Kiosk.Api.Controllers.DeviceController.GetDevice(System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves a specific device by ID, including its kiosk and customer information.
member.param: The ID of the device to retrieve.
member.returns: The device with the specified ID.
member.response: Returns the device.
If the device with the specified ID is not found.

member.name: M:Kiosk.Api.Controllers.DeviceController.PostDevice(Kiosk.Domain.DTOs.CreateDeviceDto)
member.param: The device data to create.
member.returns: The created device with its ID.
member.response: Returns the newly created device.
If the device data is invalid.

member.name: M:Kiosk.Api.Controllers.DeviceController.PutDevice(System.Int32,Kiosk.Domain.DTOs.UpdateDeviceDto)
member.summary: Updates an existing device (without modifying its kiosk assignment).
member.param: The ID of the device to update.
The updated device data.
member.returns: No content if the update was successful.
member.response: If the device was successfully updated.
If the device with the specified ID is not found.

member.name: M:Kiosk.Api.Controllers.DeviceController.DeleteDevice(System.Int32)
member.param: The ID of the device to delete.
member.returns: No content if the deletion was successful.
member.response: If the device was successfully deleted.
If the device with the specified ID is not found.

member.name: M:Kiosk.Api.Controllers.KioskController.GetKiosks
member.summary: Retrieves all kiosks with their associated customer and devices.
member.returns: A list of all kiosks with their customer and device details.
member.response: Returns the list of kiosks.
If there was an error retrieving the kiosks.

member.name: M:Kiosk.Api.Controllers.KioskController.GetKiosk(System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves a specific kiosk by ID, including its customer and devices.
member.param: The ID of the kiosk to retrieve.
member.returns: The kiosk with the specified ID.
member.response: Returns the kiosk.
If the kiosk with the specified ID is not found.

member.name: M:Kiosk.Api.Controllers.KioskController.PostKiosk(Kiosk.Domain.DTOs.CreateKioskDto)
member.summary: Creates a new kiosk (without assigning a customer or devices).
member.param: The kiosk data to create.
member.returns: The created kiosk with its ID.
member.response: Returns the newly created kiosk.
If the kiosk data is invalid.

member.name: M:Kiosk.Api.Controllers.KioskController.PutKiosk(System.Int32,Kiosk.Domain.DTOs.UpdateKioskDto)
member.summary: Updates an existing kiosk (without modifying its customer or device assignments).
member.param: The ID of the kiosk to update.
The updated kiosk data.
member.returns: No content if the update was successful.
member.response: If the kiosk was successfully updated.
If the kiosk with the specified ID is not found.

member.name: M:Kiosk.Api.Controllers.KioskController.DeleteKiosk(System.Int32)
member.param: The ID of the kiosk to delete.
member.returns: No content if the deletion was successful.
member.response: If the kiosk was successfully deleted.
If the kiosk with the specified ID is not found.

member.name: M:Kiosk.Api.Controllers.KioskController.AssignDeviceToKiosk(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Assigns a device to a kiosk.
member.param: The ID of the kiosk to assign the device to.
The ID of the device to assign.
member.returns: No content if the assignment was successful, or NotFound if the kiosk or device does not exist.
member.response: If the device was successfully assigned to the kiosk.
If the kiosk or device is not found.

member.name: M:Kiosk.Api.Controllers.KioskController.UnassignDeviceFromKiosk(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Unassigns a device from a kiosk.
member.param: The ID of the kiosk to unassign the device from.
The ID of the device to unassign.
member.returns: No content if the unassignment was successful, or NotFound if the kiosk or device does not exist, or device is not assigned to this kiosk.
member.response: If the device was successfully unassigned from the kiosk.
If the kiosk or device is not found, or device is not assigned to this kiosk.
